name: A mysterious place
description: In a world on the brink of extinction, you are the last human survivor on Earth.  When everything seems hopeless, you are redeemed by a group of gods and angels, including Chaos, Loki, Hera, Ra, Ascuas, Liz and Anubis.  These mysterious beings take you to their kingdom, a sacred kingdom where goddesses and angels coexist, the only refuge. This will be a great adventure.
creator: Teraalex
